name: @panadero-erp/workflow-management
description: Financial ERP Workflow Management System with comprehensive step types and modal interface
author: Panadero ERP Team

features: Enhanced WorkflowCard Component - Reusable with optional actions
WorkflowStatistics Component - Extracted statistics into separate component
ActiveWorkflowCard.vue - Fixed Vue structure and enhanced delete functionality
WorkflowModal.vue - Enhanced 4-column layout with proper overflow handling
WorkflowStepper.vue - Restored proper Vue structure with enhanced step display
improvements: Enhanced Hover Effects - Smooth transitions and interactive elements
Event Handler Optimization - Single action points per workflow card
